destinations.name: Barcelona
destinations.description: Barcelona is a vibrant coastal city in northeastern Spain known for its modernist architecture, Mediterranean beaches, world-class cuisine, and lively cultural scene.

destinations.name: Rome
destinations.description: Rome, Italy’s capital, blends ancient history with contemporary Italian lifestyle, featuring iconic landmarks, renowned museums, and authentic trattorias.

destinations.name: New York City
destinations.description: New York City is a global hub for business, culture, and tourism, offering diverse neighborhoods, iconic attractions, and a dynamic events calendar year-round.

destinations.name: Orlando
destinations.description: Orlando is a major leisure destination in central Florida, home to family-friendly theme parks, resort hotels, and a range of outdoor and shopping experiences.

destinations.name: Berlin
destinations.description: Berlin is Germany’s capital and a key European business and cultural center, known for its history, creative scene, and well-developed conference and hotel infrastructure.

destinations.name: Paris
destinations.description: Paris is a world-famous city of art, fashion, and gastronomy, with romantic riverfronts, historic boulevards, and a wide range of cultural and weekend travel packages.

destinations.name: Phuket
destinations.description: Phuket is Thailand’s largest island and a leading beach destination, offering beachfront resorts, island-hopping, nightlife, and a variety of water activities.

destinations.name: Lisbon
destinations.description: Lisbon, Portugal’s coastal capital, is known for its historic neighborhoods, viewpoints over the Tagus River, vibrant food scene, and nearby beaches.

destinations.name: Thailand
destinations.description: Thailand is a Southeast Asian country famed for its tropical beaches, rich culture, and welcoming hospitality, with major tourism hubs such as Bangkok, Chiang Mai, and Phuket.

destinations.name: Europe
destinations.description: Europe is a diverse region encompassing historic cities, cultural capitals, and scenic landscapes, connected by extensive transport networks and cross-border tourism initiatives.

destinations.name: Italy
destinations.description: Italy is a Southern European country known for its rich cultural heritage, regional cuisines, art cities, coastal resorts, and year-round tourism appeal.

membership_plans.name: Individual Basic
membership_plans.description: Entry-level membership for individual travel professionals seeking access to news, basic resources, and member discounts.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Access to member newsletter, basic hotel directory listings, and discounted event registration fees.

membership_plans.name: Individual Learning
membership_plans.description: Designed for individual members who want regular professional development through online training and webinars.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Includes live and on-demand training webinars, resource library access, and standard event discounts.

membership_plans.name: Individual Premium
membership_plans.description: Comprehensive membership for senior professionals seeking extended benefits, training, and networking opportunities.
membership_plans.other_benefits: All learning benefits plus priority event registration, invitation-only networking sessions, and featured member profile.

membership_plans.name: Business Starter
membership_plans.description: For small hotel or tourism businesses starting their engagement with the association.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Company listing in association directory, access to marketing toolkits, and basic advocacy updates.

membership_plans.name: Business Growth
membership_plans.description: For growing hotel groups and tourism businesses that want staff training and broader visibility.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Team access to training webinars, enhanced directory placement, and discounted exhibitor rates at events.

membership_plans.name: Student Access
membership_plans.description: Affordable membership for students in hospitality, tourism, or related fields.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Access to selected training webinars, internship listings, and mentorship program matching where available.

membership_plans.name: Organization Partner
membership_plans.description: Membership for tourism boards and associations that want to collaborate on marketing and training initiatives.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Organization-wide webinar access, co-branded campaigns, and participation in advisory committees.

membership_plans.name: Honorary & Affiliate
membership_plans.description: Special membership category for partners, retired professionals, or affiliates with limited benefits.
membership_plans.other_benefits: Recognition on the website and invitations to select networking receptions; benefits may vary by agreement.

attractions.name: Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel
attractions.description: One of the world’s greatest art collections, featuring the Sistine Chapel, Raphael Rooms, and galleries spanning centuries of history.
attractions.opening_hours: Mon–Sat 09:00–18:00; last entry 16:00; closed Sun except last Sunday of the month.

attractions.name: Galleria Borghese
attractions.description: An elegant villa museum showcasing masterpieces by Bernini, Caravaggio, and Canova in an intimate setting.

attractions.name: Villa Borghese Gardens
attractions.description: A vast landscaped park ideal for strolling, picnics, and panoramic views over Rome from Pincian Terrace.

attractions.name: Colosseum & Roman Forum
attractions.description: Explore Rome’s iconic amphitheater and the ruins of the ancient political and commercial heart of the city.

attractions.name: Trastevere Evening Food Tour
attractions.description: Guided small-group tour through Rome’s Trastevere district, combining traditional eateries, wine bars, and dessert stops.
attractions.opening_hours: Tours typically depart daily at 18:00 and 19:00; check operator schedule.

attractions.name: Sagrada Família Basilica
attractions.description: Antoni Gaudí’s unfinished masterpiece and Barcelona’s most visited landmark, blending Gothic and Art Nouveau forms.

attractions.name: Park Güell
attractions.description: Colorful park with Gaudí-designed mosaics, serpentine benches, and hillside views over Barcelona.

attractions.name: Louvre Museum
attractions.description: The world’s largest art museum, home to the Mona Lisa, the Venus de Milo, and thousands of other masterpieces.
attractions.opening_hours: Mon, Thu, Sat, Sun 09:00–18:00; Wed & Fri 09:00–21:45; closed Tue.

attractions.name: Luxembourg Gardens
attractions.description: Elegant public park with tree-lined promenades, fountains, and the Luxembourg Palace, popular with locals and visitors.
attractions.opening_hours: Open daily from early morning until sunset; hours vary seasonally.

attractions.name: Castelo de São Jorge
attractions.description: Hilltop Moorish castle offering sweeping views over Lisbon’s historic center and the Tagus River.
attractions.address: Rua de Santa Cruz do Castelo, 1100-129 Lisboa, Portugal

attractions.name: Belém Tower
attractions.description: UNESCO-listed riverside fortress symbolizing Portugal’s Age of Discoveries.

attractions.name: Central Park
attractions.description: Iconic urban park with lakes, meadows, walking paths, and cultural landmarks in the heart of Manhattan.

attractions.name: Orlando Theme Park Day Pass
attractions.description: Full-day access to a partner Orlando theme park with included shuttle from selected hotels.
attractions.opening_hours: Park hours vary by date; typically 09:00–21:00.

attractions.name: Phang Nga Bay Boat Tour
attractions.description: Day trip by speedboat through limestone karsts and emerald waters, with cave kayaking and beach stops.
attractions.opening_hours: Daily departures around 08:30; tour duration 7–8 hours.

attractions.name: Museum Island
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site comprising five world-renowned museums on an island in the Spree River.
attractions.opening_hours: Hours vary by museum; most 10:00–18:00 Tue–Sun.

events.name: NYC Urban Hotel Networking Mixer
events.description: Evening networking reception for hotel managers, sales representatives, and tourism partners focused on urban travel trends.
events.address: 123 W 38th St, New York, NY 10018, USA

events.name: Tourism Tech & Revenue Forum
events.description: One-day forum exploring revenue management, marketing automation, and guest experience tech for hotels and city attractions.
events.address: 655 W 34th St, New York, NY 10001, USA

events.name: Sustainable Stays Roundtable
events.description: Interactive roundtable for hoteliers implementing eco-certifications and sustainable operations in urban properties.
events.address: 80 Broad St, New York, NY 10004, USA

events.name: Berlin Business Travel Summit
events.description: Annual summit bringing together business hotels, corporate travel buyers, and technology providers in Berlin.

events.name: Paris Cultural Tourism Marketing Forum
events.description: Strategy-focused event for museums, cultural attractions, and hotels to collaborate on Paris city-break campaigns.

events.name: Designing One-Day Rome Itineraries
events.description: Hands-on workshop for guides and concierges on crafting balanced one-day itineraries around Rome’s key sites.

events.name: Lisbon Gastronomy & Boutique Stays Webinar
events.description: Online webinar exploring Lisbon’s evolving food scene and partnerships between boutique hotels and local restaurants.

events.name: Orlando Family Travel Forum
events.description: Regional forum focused on family-friendly hotel services, theme park partnerships, and safety best practices.

events.name: Phuket Beach Resort Marketing Clinic
events.description: Small-group clinic for beachfront properties on packaging, airport transfers, and digital offers.

events.name: Barcelona City Hotels Meetup
events.description: Casual networking meetup for city-center hotels, tour operators, and DMCs in Barcelona.

landmarks.name: Berlin Central Station
landmarks.description: Berlin Hauptbahnhof is the city’s main railway station and a key reference point for nearby business hotels.

landmarks.name: Lisbon City Center
landmarks.description: Central Lisbon around Baixa and Rossio, used as the reference point for distance-based restaurant searches.

landmarks.name: Barcelona City Center
landmarks.description: Central Barcelona near Plaça de Catalunya, a hub for shopping, hotels, and transport connections.

landmarks.name: Rome Historic Center
landmarks.description: Rome’s historic core around Piazza Venezia and Via del Corso, close to many major sights.

landmarks.name: Paris City Center
landmarks.description: Central Paris around the 1st and 4th arrondissements, often used as a distance reference for hotels and packages.

packages.name: Paris Cultural Weekend – Left Bank Highlights
packages.description: Three-day cultural escape on the Left Bank with central hotel, guided walking tour, Seine cruise, and daily breakfast.
packages.other_inclusions: 2 nights in 3–4 star hotel, Seine evening cruise, museum pass for 2 museums, local transport card.

packages.name: Classic Paris Cultural Weekend Package
packages.description: Weekend stay near the Opéra district with a guided city highlights tour, Louvre entry, and buffet breakfasts.
packages.other_inclusions: 2 nights in a central 4-star hotel, half-day guided city tour, skip-the-line Louvre ticket, metro pass.

packages.name: Luxury Paris Culture & Gourmet Getaway
packages.description: Upscale weekend featuring 5-star accommodation, private guided city tour, gourmet dinner, and champagne cruise.
packages.other_inclusions: 2 nights in a 5-star boutique hotel, private 3-hour city tour, 4-course tasting dinner, champagne cruise.

packages.name: Barcelona Beach & Culture Weekend
packages.description: Combine time at the beach with a guided Old Town walking tour and breakfasts at a central Barcelona hotel.
packages.other_inclusions: 3 nights in a central 4-star hotel, guided Gothic Quarter tour, T-10 transport card.

packages.name: Rome Ancient Highlights Weekend
packages.description: Weekend break with Colosseum guided tour, Roman Forum entry, and breakfast at a centrally located hotel.
packages.other_inclusions: 2 nights in 4-star hotel near the historic center, skip-the-line Colosseum & Forum tour, airport shuttle on arrival.

packages.name: Lisbon River Views & Fado Weekend
packages.description: Charming Lisbon stay with breakfast, tram passes, and an evening fado show in the historic Alfama district.
packages.other_inclusions: 2 nights in a boutique guesthouse, historic tram pass, fado dinner show, airport transfer.

restaurants.name: Taberna do Centro
restaurants.description: Cozy Portuguese taberna near Rossio serving petiscos, grilled fish, and regional wines.

restaurants.name: Baixa Tasca Tradicional
restaurants.description: Traditional tasca with daily specials, cod dishes, and homemade desserts a short walk from the city center.

restaurants.name: Alfama View Grill
restaurants.description: Casual hilltop restaurant with views over Alfama and a menu of grilled sardines, octopus, and regional tapas.
restaurants.address: Calçada do Menino Jesus 18, 1100-207 Lisboa, Portugal

restaurants.name: Ribeira Tapas & Mar
restaurants.description: Waterfront spot near Cais do Sodré featuring petiscos, seafood rice, and local craft beers.
restaurants.address: Av. Ribeira das Naus 20, 1100-454 Lisboa, Portugal

restaurants.name: La Rambla Tapas Bar
restaurants.description: Bustling tapas bar just off La Rambla serving classics like patatas bravas, bombas, and sangria.

restaurants.name: Trastevere Trattoria Romana
restaurants.description: Family-run trattoria with Roman specialties like carbonara, amatriciana, and artichokes alla romana.
restaurants.address: Via della Scala 52, 00153 Roma RM, Italy

restaurants.name: Bistrot Rive Gauche
restaurants.description: Classic Left Bank bistro offering onion soup, steak-frites, and crème brûlée in a cozy setting.

restaurants.name: Midtown Brasserie & Bar
restaurants.description: Modern brasserie popular with business travelers, serving international comfort dishes and cocktails.
restaurants.address: 200 W 40th St, New York, NY 10018, USA

restaurants.name: Orlando Family Buffet & Grill
restaurants.description: Casual buffet with kids’ stations, salad bar, and grilled favorites, close to major theme parks.

restaurants.name: Berlin Business Lounge Restaurant
restaurants.description: Stylish restaurant near Berlin Central Station with fast business lunches and evening fine dining.

restaurants.name: Andaman Beachfront BBQ
restaurants.description: Laid-back beachfront restaurant with fresh seafood BBQ, Thai curries, and sunset views.

hotels.name: Gràcia Garden Hotel
hotels.description: Stylish 4-star hotel on a quiet street in Gràcia, offering garden-view rooms, easy metro access, and a relaxed local neighborhood feel.
hotels.address: Carrer de Sant Pere Màrtir 18, 08012 Barcelona, Spain

hotels.name: Ramblas Centro Hotel
hotels.description: Modern 4-star property a short walk from La Rambla and Plaça de Catalunya, ideal for city breaks and shopping trips.

hotels.name: Port Vell Business & Spa Hotel
hotels.description: Harbor-side 4-star hotel with a rooftop plunge pool, small spa, and meeting space overlooking Port Vell.

hotels.name: Barceloneta Seafront Resort
hotels.description: Upscale beachfront resort with sea-view rooms, outdoor pool, and direct access to Barceloneta Beach.
hotels.address: Passeig Marítim de la Barceloneta 32, 08003 Barcelona, Spain

hotels.name: Orlando Family Suites I-Drive
hotels.description: All-suite hotel on International Drive with themed family rooms, kids pool area, and complimentary hot breakfast.

hotels.name: Orlando Theme Park Inn
hotels.description: Budget-friendly property offering family rooms, outdoor pool, and shuttle service to major Orlando theme parks.

hotels.name: Lake Buena Vista Resort & Conference Center
hotels.description: Full-service resort near Lake Buena Vista with lagoon-style pool, on-site dining, and flexible conference facilities.
hotels.address: 1905 Hotel Plaza Blvd, Lake Buena Vista, FL 32830, USA

hotels.name: Hauptbahnhof Business Hotel
hotels.description: Contemporary business hotel directly across from Berlin Central Station, with fast Wi‑Fi and flexible meeting rooms.

hotels.name: Spree Riverside Conference Hotel
hotels.description: Riverfront business hotel with panoramic boardrooms and a spacious ballroom, a short walk from Berlin Hauptbahnhof.

hotels.name: Mitte Boutique Stay
hotels.description: Design-forward boutique hotel in Berlin Mitte, walking distance from Museum Island and major business addresses.

hotels.name: Patong Beachfront Retreat
hotels.description: Relaxed beachfront resort on Patong Beach with sea-view pool, swim-up bar, and complimentary shuttle from Phuket Airport.

hotels.name: Karon Oceanview Resort & Spa
hotels.description: Elevated beachfront resort overlooking Karon Beach, featuring infinity pools, spa treatments, and airport shuttle options.

hotels.name: Kamala Family Beach Resort
hotels.description: Family-oriented resort on Kamala Beach with kids club, shallow pools, and flexible connecting rooms.

hotels.name: Baixa Riverside Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: Chic boutique property in Baixa with river-view rooms, a small rooftop terrace, and easy access to tram 28.

hotels.name: Rome Centro Historic Inn
hotels.description: Compact 3-star inn between the Colosseum and Trevi Fountain, ideal for one-day sightseeing itineraries.
hotels.address: Via dei Serpenti 30, 00184 Roma RM, Italy

hotels.name: Left Bank Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: Intimate Left Bank hotel with individually decorated rooms, a library lounge, and easy access to major museums.
hotels.address: 15 Rue de l'École de Médecine, 75006 Paris, France

hotels.name: Midtown Business Inn
hotels.description: Practical choice for business travelers with comfortable rooms, fast Wi‑Fi, and easy access to Midtown offices.
hotels.address: 45 W 37th St, New York, NY 10018, USA

hotel_room_types.name: Standard Double Room
hotel_room_types.description: Comfortable double room with garden-facing window, desk, and walk-in shower.

hotel_room_types.name: Family Connecting Room
hotel_room_types.description: Two connecting double rooms ideal for small families, including complimentary breakfast for all guests.

hotel_room_types.name: Two-Bedroom Family Suite
hotel_room_types.description: Spacious suite with separate bedroom, kids sleeping area, kitchenette, and sofa bed.

hotel_room_types.name: Deluxe Family Room
hotel_room_types.description: Larger guest room with two double beds and mini-fridge, close to the pool area.

hotel_room_types.name: Business King Room
hotel_room_types.description: Soundproofed room facing the station plaza with ergonomic workspace and high-speed WiFi.

hotel_room_types.name: Sea View Deluxe Room
hotel_room_types.description: Upper-floor room with balcony overlooking Patong Beach, including airport shuttle and daily breakfast.

hotel_room_types.name: Oceanview Suite
hotel_room_types.description: Corner suite with separate living room, panoramic sea views, and complimentary access to the spa hydro pool.
